product_name: Gyeon Q²m Quickdetailer Seramik Bazlı Parlatıcı Yüzey Detaylandırıcı - 1000 ml -Leke Giderici
transcript_text: Hi guys! Welcome back in this new episode of "The Detailing Guru" and in this one I'm gonna show you how to use quick detailers correctly. For the past 10 years I've seen the use the quick detailers in so many wrong ways. My favorite one is when you go to car shows.. The guys are arriving with the car with a lot of dust and not only dust - there is the debris on the streets, there is brake dust on the car. They use one towel and they're start spraying the whole car with quick detailer and wiping it down. This might make your car a little bit shiny, but you'll add some scratches as well and this is, for sure, something that you don't want when you have nice and glossy and even coated car. When do we use quick detailers? Well, in my honest opinion the ideal way to use it is as a drying aid. After you've washed and decontaminated your car do couple of sprays in your drying towel and than you'll not be dragging around debris over your paintwork. Of course, when the drying process is done you can take the separate microfibre towel and do the final touch-up with the fresh one to remove any spots that you've left with, for example, your drying towel. Let me show you how I like to use it. Drying aid - this is my preferred way to use any type of quick detailer. First you take your drying towel, prefer drying towel and you do couple of sprays inside of your towel to reduce drag. I do spray on the panel and I start drying. Now I have a dry panel without any friction. I'll take another microfibre towel to give it final touch for that sharp finish The second method is after the drying process - the car is completely dry and I'll use it: spraying it in my first towel and try to remove all the leftover spots that I had after my drying process. Here we go with spray it in the towel.. And importance notice: make sure you have secondary towel - I'd like to spray it first in short nap towel and I have secondary longerpile towel to remove any possible residue that still on the paint. By using this process I never dragged any possible debris around the paintwork, because it's clean The only scenario in which I would use quick detailer dry is for example when I don't have access to any pressure wash or water and I have a big bird poo on my car. I have a Q²M Quick Detailer always sitting in my car and than you can use a jet stream to have a lot of products on the bird poo and with a multiple towels are a reduce friction and try to take it away. It's always a better solution, because when it stays on it for the next 2 hours when you driving home - it's done and you need polishing. In this case quick detailer dry - can be a great solution. Now you know my prefer method of using quick detailer - please give it try and let me know your feedback below in the comments. I'm out, see you soon. Ciao!

product_name: Menzerna Yeni 400 Fast Gloss - Çizik Çıkarıcı Pasta 250ml.
transcript_text:
Menzerna HCC 400 Heavy Cut Compound is an innovative polish for automotive clear coats. HCC 400 offers abrasion and a high-gloss finish in a single step. Automotive paint is made up of several layers. Polish is only applied to the roughly 45 µm-thin clear-coat layer. By comparison: a strand of hair is about twice as thick. Menzerna understands industrial polishing down to the finest detail. Clear coat with wear and tear or scratches appears mat, as the rough surface texture reflects less light. A little HCC 400 goes a long way, meaning only a small amount is required. When it’s combined with the Menzerna Heavy Cut Foam Pad, even deep scratches can be buffed out. HCC 400 is extremely fast and abrasive at the start of polishing. Then, grit agglomerates crumble to enable a hologram-free, high-gloss finish. Innovative polishing technology from Menzerna. It’s compatible with both orbital and eccentric machines. Professional vehicle finishers save time and money with HCC 400. Compared with a conventional process, a brilliant, high-gloss finish is achieved with just one product and one change of pads. HCC 400 is fully worked in when it becomes transparent rather than milky. Any residue can be removed with a fine microfiber cloth. Perfect. The surface has been mechanically smoothed. Light is evenly and effectively reflected. A perfect mirror finish. Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400:
ideal for car manufacturers and detailing professionals. High cut, high gloss.
Get the job done in a single cost-effective step. 
Water-based, no silicones or fillers. Quality made in Germany!

product_name: Fra-Ber Bersolux Cilalı Köpüklü Manuel Araç Yıkama Şampuanı - 1000 ml
transcript_text: Bersolux is a concentrated neutral shampoo with added wax suitable for all types of paint, including matte, metallic, or wrapped finishes. Dilute 20 to 40 ml of Bersolux per liter of water in a bucket with a grit guard at the bottom. Rinse the vehicle thoroughly before applying the product, removing any dirt that could damage the bodywork. Use a clean glove or sponge for application, mixing the solution first. Thanks to the product's lubricating properties, it is easy to apply and glides while cleaning in depth. The product can also be applied with a pump and pre-compression. And distributed with a bristle brush. Finally, rinse thoroughly with plenty of water, from top to bottom, allowing the dirt to "flow" to the ground. A wax-enriched shampoo is highly functional because its water-repellent properties help water slide off, creating a "self-drying" effect. Being less foamy, it is also easier to rinse off. Additionally, the waxing properties fill in micro-scratches, leaving the bodywork shiny and glossy.

product_name: Fra-Ber Lustradry Susuz Yüzey Temizleyici ve Parlatıcı - 750 ml
transcript_text: Lustradry by Fra-Ber is the ideal fast cleaner, protective treatment and polish for waterless cleaning. Although it is a professional product, it is very easy to use. Simply spray the pure product onto the surface from a distance of about 15 cm. Allow a few moments for the product to soften the dirt. We recommend using two microfibre cloths: one to remove the dirt and the other to finish the surface. Work panel by panel, treating a small area at a time. Its fast action makes it perfect for quick and easy cleaning without compromising cleaning power.

We recommend using two microfibre cloths: one to remove the dirt and the other to finish the surface.
Work panel by panel, treating a small area at a time.
Its fast action makes it perfect for quick and easy cleaning without compromising cleaning power.

product_name: Fra-Ber Det Leather Araç Deri Koltuk Temizleyici ve Bakım – 750 ml
transcript_text: Det Leather by Fra-Ber is the ideal cleaner for car leather interiors. It is recommended to begin by vacuuming the areas to be treated, then gently dab the surface with a microfibre cloth dampened with warm water. This helps soften the leather, open the pores and fibres and make cleaning easier. For routine cleaning, simply spray the product from a distance of about 15 cm and wipe away any excess with a microfibre cloth. For deeper cleaning, it can also be applied with a soft-bristled brush or a microfibre pad, always wiping off any residue with a clean cloth. In case of stubborn dirt, and depending on the sensitivity of the surface, a melamine sponge may be used. Thanks to its light abrasive action, it allows for deep cleaning, taking care not to apply too much pressure.

product_name: Fra-Ber Gommalux Uzun Süreli Lastik Parlatıcı ve Koruyucu Sprey - 750 ml
transcript_text: Gommalux by Fra-Ber is a professional tire shine that does not leave a greasy or sticky finish and renews tires of any type. For a semi-matte finish, we recommend using the ready-to-use 750ml version, which is sprayed directly onto the tire. We suggest using a pad to spread the product evenly and ensure it penetrates every part of the tire. Gommalux is suitable for preserving and protecting rubber and plastic. Thanks to its innovative components, which penetrate micropores, it can prevent aging cracks with prolonged use and protect against weather conditions. For those who prefer an extra-shine finish, the gas version is available in 250ml and 600ml sizes. Spray the product from a distance of 15 cm. This targeted spray is perfect for low-profile tires as it prevents overspray on adjacent areas that don't need treatment. The product can also be used to finish side moldings. For this type of use, we recommend applying the product with a microfiber cloth to avoid leaving any residue on the surface. You can choose the gloss level you prefer: more matte using the 750ml format, semi-glossy by diluting the 1LT product or extra glossy by using the gas format.

product_name: Fra-Ber Gommalux Uzun Süreli Lastik Parlatıcı ve Koruyucu Sprey - 750 ml
transcript_text: Hey guys and welcome back to our experience area! In this episode, we will be presenting two fantastic products. One is called Lega and you can use it to clean your car rims, and the other is Gommalux for protecting the tyres. First of all, cleaning the rims is the first important thing to do  when cleaning your car. And now I’ll show you how to clean your car rims with our Lega product. Spray the product evenly, starting from the inside out  and then onto the tyre, without leaving out the most concealed gaps! Leave on for a few minutes, just long enough to apply the product to the other rims. But be careful: don’t let the product dry on its own, especially in summer! You can use a glove or brush to properly clean the inside of the rim, the back of the spokes, the channel and, finally, the tyre. Make sure to use dedicated cleaning tools  when cleaning the rims and tyres. If you have to use them again,  wash them thoroughly so that no residue remains between the bristles,  which could damage delicate car parts. Now rinse, either with or without high pressure. Lega is a universal cleaner for all types of rims, which gives them a shiny finish, making them look new and leaving an antioxidant film. Let’s now use Gommalux on the tyres:  it is an excellent product that protects and restores them,  and it’s really easy to use! We are now going to spray the product onto the clean surface, using a brush or hand applicator to apply it so that it penetrates into all the crevices. This product must never be used on the tread of the tyre to avoid compromising grip. Gommalux protects against the elements and, since it is a product water-based, it protects against cracking, unlike solvent-based products that leave the tyres greasy or make them dry out. Caution! You should never apply too much tyre polish,  otherwise the product could splash onto the bodywork or rims when you drive off. Instead, it should be applied in two stages at different times.

product_name: Fra-Ber Polish Plus Aroma Genel Plastik Parlatıcı Koruyucu 750ML
transcript_text: Hey guys, welcome to our experience area! In this episode  we will show you the best way to use our product Polish Plus Aroma. Polish Plus Aroma has been specifically designed to clean and protect  the internal and external plastic parts of any vehicle such as dashboards, bumpers, mudguards, rubber and leather parts, without forgetting the trims. Remember that the plastic and rubber details have micro pores so they tend to absorb dust and impurities, ageing prematurely! This is why we recommend using Polish Plus Aroma regularly after a thorough cleaning. Being a water-based and non-solvent product, it easily penetrates and hydrates surfaces. And now let’s see how to use it! Take Polish Plus Aroma and spray it on the surface to be treated at a distance of 20 cm. Spread the product evenly with the help of a short-fibred microfibre cloth so that the product is not absorbed by the cloth but is evenly distributed on the surface. This cloth is useful and safe as it has been cut with laser cut technology, therefore without edges or seams, making it safe on all surfaces, without scratching them. Instead, I recommend using the manual applicator Micron App  if you need to spread the product on specific areas,  since thanks to the practical pocket on the back,  you can insert your hand and reach all surfaces  that you wish to treat in detail. Lastly use a dry cloth to finish everything. Its special formula leaves surfaces smooth to the touch, without whitening them,  making them as good as new without greasing. This is an essential product as it leaves a crucial anti-static and anti-UV barrier for all those plastic parts exposed to the sun’s rays. Last but not least:  it leaves a nice vanilla scent. Want some advice for bumpers and tyres? Spray the product evenly and abundantly, leave it for one to three minutes  so that it penetrates, remove any excess. Renewing effect guaranteed!

product_name: FRA-BER Lustratouch Boya Koruyucu Ve Parlatıcı - 750 ml
transcript_text: Lustratouch has an innovative formulation that combines the effects of a spray wax and a polishing polish in one product, with three functions: it protects, polishes, and makes the surface water-repellent. Apply 2-3 sprays of the product without water on a dry and clean surface. The product is easy to use because it does not contain abrasives, and its formulation does not leave residues, unlike traditional waxes that are difficult to spread. When you feel the cloth gliding smoothly, it means the product's polymerization is complete. It can also be applied to plastics, aluminum, and glass. It gives the surface a shine over 30% and creates a protective barrier with anti-redepositing power against dirt. It also leaves the surface smooth and water-repellent, preventing dirt from clinging easily.

product_name: Fra-Ber Polish Plus Aroma Genel Plastik Parlatıcı Koruyucu 750ML
transcript_text: Polish Plus Aroma is a restorer for plastics, rubber, and leather, both interior and exterior, of any type of vehicle. The 750ml format is easy to use and ready to apply. Simply spray the product from a distance of 20cm onto the surface to be treated. Unlike many other products on the market, this is water-based and not solvent-based, so it penetrates the surface very well and hydrates it. We recommend using a microfiber pad when detailed application on certain surfaces is necessary. Surfaces being porous attract a lot of dust and tend to bleach, we recommend that you protect them regularly after deep cleaning because the product creates an anti-static and anti-UV barrier that preserves them over time. The result is a smooth surface to the touch without whitening, providing an extreme renewing effect with a fantastic semi-matte finish and an exceptional vanilla fragrance.

product_name: Fra-Ber Cream Leather Deri Bakım ve Koruyucu Parfümlü - 4,54 Lt
transcript_text: Cream Leather by Fra-Ber is ideal for repairing and restoring leather interiors, leaving them soft and supple. Application is very simple: spray the product from about 15 cm away onto a sponge or cloth, or directly onto the leather to be treated. Spread evenly with circular movements using a microfiber applicator. Let it work and, if necessary, remove any excess with a microfiber cloth. The nourishing action restores elasticity and softness to the treated surfaces. When applied regularly over time, the treatment helps maintain the leather’s elasticity, slowing the appearance of cracking and tearing. After application, Cream Leather leaves a pleasant fragrance and is available in black orchid and leather fragrance.

product_name: Fra-Ber Cream Leather Deri Bakım ve Koruyucu Parfümlü - 4,54 Lt
transcript_text:
Hey guys, welcome back to our Experience Area! In this video tutorial, we will show you  how to treat the leather parts of your car and motorcycle with the Det Leather and Cream Leather products. In order to show you the final result more distinctly, we will divide the areas to be treated with tape, leaving the centre area untreated. Now let’s start cleaning! If you have time, the first thing to do is to dab the surface with a 2F Micron microfibre cloth that is soaked in very hot water in order to soften the structure, open the pores and fibres so as to enable thorough cleaning, as though it were taking a steam bath!
Now, the best Fra-Ber product to use for thorough leather cleaning is Det Leather, a gentle degreaser that can be used with various instruments based on the degree of dirt that must be treated. For ordinary cleaning, simply spray the product and remove any excess with a cloth. Should more in-depth cleaning be required, without ruining the surface, we recommend our Soft Brush, or a soft bristle brush for leather. Lastly, wipe the surface with the Micron HD cloth. For extraordinary cleaning, when the dirt is significant and the above techniques were not enough, we recommend using Det Leather with a melamine sponge, our White Sponge. This sponge is made of very resistant plastic that applies a light abrasive action on the surface. This is why it has to be used with care on the surface, without pressing too hard. Always bear in mind that shiny leather is not a sign of cleanliness but dirt; instead, opaque leather is synonymous with clean leather! Now that the leather is clean, you can protect and nourish it with our Cream Leather balm. Don’t worry if your car has leather with closed pores and a clear coat since our product creates a flexible protection with a silky feel. It also protects the leather against UV rays, which may damage it.
Spray the product and apply it accurately with circular movements using our Micron App applicator. Let it set and, if necessary, remove any excess with our Micron Up cloth. As you can see, the leather is softer, more supple and responsive to movements: this way, it will keep its original appearance despite ageing. The result is truly amazing. No other words are needed, just look and see for yourself! Today, I used Cream Leather with the very popular Black Orchid fragrance, but I recommend you also try the other fragrances available! All you need to do is to try it out yourself and let us know what you think in the comments section. Goodbye!

product_name: Fra-Ber Gommalux Uzun Süreli Lastik Parlatıcı ve Koruyucu Sprey - 600 ml
transcript_text: Hey guys and welcome back to our experience area! In this episode, we will be presenting two fantastic products. One is called Lega and you can use it to clean your car rims, and the other is Gommalux for protecting the tyres. First of all, cleaning the rims is the first important thing to do  when cleaning your car. And now I’ll show you how to clean your car rims with our Lega product. Spray the product evenly, starting from the inside out  and then onto the tyre, without leaving out the most concealed gaps! Leave on for a few minutes, just long enough to apply the product to the other rims. But be careful: don’t let the product dry on its own, especially in summer! You can use a glove or brush to properly clean the inside of the rim, the back of the spokes, the channel and, finally, the tyre. Make sure to use dedicated cleaning tools  when cleaning the rims and tyres. If you have to use them again,  wash them thoroughly so that no residue remains between the bristles,  which could damage delicate car parts. Now rinse, either with or without high pressure. Lega is a universal cleaner for all types of rims, which gives them a shiny finish, making them look new and leaving an antioxidant film. Let’s now use Gommalux on the tyres:  it is an excellent product that protects and restores them,  and it’s really easy to use! We are now going to spray the product onto the clean surface, using a brush or hand applicator to apply it so that it penetrates into all the crevices. This product must never be used on the tread of the tyre to avoid compromising grip. Gommalux protects against the elements and, since it is a product water-based, it protects against cracking, unlike solvent-based products that leave the tyres greasy or make them dry out. Caution! You should never apply too much tyre polish,  otherwise the product could splash onto the bodywork or rims when you drive off. Instead, it should be applied in two stages at different times.

product_name: Fra-Ber Brilliant Drakar Antistatik Konsol ve Iç Plastik Temizleyici Parlatıcı Parfümlü - 600 ml
transcript_text: Brilliant by Fra-Ber is a professional dashboard polish for cars, ideal for reviving, polishing and protecting plastics. The product is ready to use. Simply shake and spray it from a distance of about 20 cm, keeping the can in a vertical position. Then wipe the surface with a clean cloth and wait for it to dry. Thanks to its formula, it helps prevent aging, whitening and cracking of plastic materials. The product is available in different sizes and fragrances, so you can change the scent without compromising on performance.

product_name: Gyeon Q2 AntiFog Buğu Önleyici 120ml
transcript_text: Gyeon Q² AntiFog Foggy windows can be really annoying & dangerous Gyeon Q² AntiFog prevents your glass being foggy & will give you great visibility. When applying Q² AntiFog make sure your windows are really clean After that, use Q² AntiFog on the block-suede applicator and apply in circular motions on your windscreen Wipe till a very light slight haze and use the dedicated big Q²M Suede for its final wipe down. Before applying Q² AntiFog make sure you give a final wipe down with Q²M Prep after that let it sit for about 30min to let the product evaporate and then apply Q² AntiFog. Enjoy & drive safe!

product_name: Fra-Ber Lindo Cam, Lake ve Parlak Yüzey Temizleyici (1:10 Konsantre) - 5 kg
transcript_text: Lindo by Fra-Ber is a professional cleaner for cleaning car windows and glass. It is very easy to use: simply spray the product onto the glass from a distance of about 20 cm. Then wipe with a dry, clean cloth. It can be used undiluted or diluted depending on the degree of dirt and your needs. Thanks to its formula, it removes grease, dust and smog residues from windows, windscreens and rear-view mirrors. It is ideal for quick and effective cleaning without leaving streaks or smears.

product_name: Fra-Ber Multıforce Çok Amaçlı Güçlü Yağ ve Kir Temizleyici Sprey - 600 gr
transcript_text: Fra-Ber's Multiforce is a powerful, concentrated degreaser for stubborn dirt. Although it is a professional product, it is simple and easy to use. Simply spray the undiluted product and leave it to work for 1 minute. For deeper cleaning, the product can be applied with a medium bristle brush. The 650 ml format is equipped with a trigger that dispenses the product in foam, for deep cleaning even on vertical surfaces. After application, rinse with a damp cloth. Thanks to its formula, it has a renewing and extra-bright effect and leaves a pleasant clean scent. Multiforce can be diluted according to the degree of dirt and different needs. It can be used undiluted for heavy soiling, or diluted 1:3 for cleaning lighter soiling. As an All Purpose Cleaner, it can be used up to a dilution of 1:10. Multiforce is the ideal degreaser for car interiors and exteriors, and for all types of vehicles and environments.

product_name: Menzerna Marin Gelcoat Boya 3in1 Tek Adım Pasta Cila Koruma - 1 Lt
transcript_text: Menserna polishing compounds. Hi, I'm Chris from Menza and today I'm going to show you how we professionally refurbish a gel coat surface. We'll be using the Gelco premium gloss from Menza. Let's go. Here we see a typical damage on a gel coat surface. Συνεχίστε μέχρι να καλυφθεί όλο το όχημα Χάρη στα ενεργά ένζυμα αφαιρεί ακόμα και την πιο επίμονη οργανική βρωμιά  καθώς τα ένζυμα δρουν πολλαπλές φορές στα ίδια μόρια βρωμιάς. Συνεχίστε ξεπλένοντας με άφθονο νερό.  Τέλος, στεγνώστε την επιφάνεια με την  “water veil”  τεχνική  που δημιουργεί υδροαπωθητική επίδραση και διώχνει το νερό στο έδαφος. product_name: Fra-Ber Spumone Self Yağ Çözücü Güçlü Ön Yıkama Köpüğü - 1000 ml
transcript_text:
Hello everyone! Today I will explain how to use our new product SPUMONE SELF!  SPUMONE SELF is a professional concentrated degreaser for intensive cleaning that removes stubborn, layered and hard-to-remove dirt. Dirt, oil, grease, traffic film, smog and bugs will be removed effortlessly thanks to its immediate degreasing capacity! In addition to cars, it is recommended for all work vehicles such as lorries and vans  or in contexts of even more extreme dirt such as excavators, scrapers and even tractors!  In industrial contexts it can be used for cleaning mechanical parts, engines, tool, lathes or machinery.   Even for the floors of shops soiled with grease and mineral oils! And not only that! You can also use it on campers to remove bothersome black streaks that develop on the bodywork! We always recommend not to apply the product to hot or delicate surfaces.  Do not work under the sun and do not let it dry! We will try it now on this white van where we can note the presence of dirt and traffic film on the back. To test the efficacy of the product we will mark an X with our fingers on the back door  to manually remove the most intense dirt. When we are finished washing, if we no longer see the X  this means that the product has a very high degreasing action! We will now apply the product with the active foam system, starting from the bottom and working upwards.  Look what fantastic foam it creates and how long it clings on to clean deeply! We then leave the product on for a few minutes and proceed with rinsing with the pressure washer.  We can see how dirt and traffic film are completely removed... the X is no longer visible! 
  So we have proven the efficacy of the product! Are you curious to see the application in an even more extreme situation?  Let’s put SPUMONE SELF to the test by applying it to the stubborn dirt of this tractor! It is possible to apply the diluted product using the graduated bottle or with a manual precompression pump. For normal dirt it is possible to use between 20 ml and 40 ml of product per litre of water.  For the most stubborn dirt, on the other hand, as in this case, we recommend using up to 100 ml of product. We proceed with applying the product with the manual precompression pump on the wheel of the tractor and the mudguard. We leave the product on for a few minutes. By touching the surface you can already observe the product’s incredible degreasing action. Rinse. We can see how, also in an extreme case, that the result is amazing! We hope that this video was useful. Let us know what you think of this product in the comments. See you next time!

product_name: Fra-Ber Tex Kumaş Temizleyici ve Koruyucu Köpük 600ML.
transcript_text: Tex by Fra-Ber is an active foam stain remover and cleaner suitable for all car fabrics. Before application, vacuum thoroughly. Shake and spray the product from a distance of about 20 cm, holding the can upright. Wipe with a clean cloth to remove excess product and wait for the surface to dry. Its active foam deeply cleans dry stains and does not drip. It is ideal for cleaning car headliners or for deep cleaning car mats, which must first be thoroughly vacuumed. Use a stiff bristle brush to loosen the fibres and make cleaning even more effective. When finished, wipe with a clean cloth to remove any residual dirt and speed up drying.

product_name: Fra-Ber Neve Yoğun Köpüklü Araç Yıkama Şampuanı Cilalı Parfümlü Oto Köpüğü - 1 Lt
transcript_text: Neve by Fra-Ber is the ideal active foam car shampoo for removing dirt and road grime of all kinds. It is a professional product that can be used both in car washes and by car wash enthusiasts. When applied with a foaming gun, use a dilution of 1:2 to 1:4 and distribute the foam over the entire vehicle, starting from the bottom. Apply the product with horizontal movements, gradually working your way upwards to avoid dripping during rinsing. Thanks to its snow effect, it is ideal for washing your car in an exciting and spectacular way. The thick, dense foam adheres to the bodywork for longer, ensuring greater cleaning action. Rinse with plenty of high-pressure water, starting from the top of the vehicle and working downwards. If applied with a pre-compression pump or bucket, use a dilution of 1:25 to 1:50. Apply the product starting from the bottom and distributing it evenly over the entire surface. Then rinse with plenty of high-pressure water, moving from top to bottom.

product_name: Fra-Ber Ko Iron Demir Tozu Sökücü ve Jant Temizleyici - 750 ml
transcript_text: Hello and welcome back to our Experience area! Today we will learn how to use the new product KO IRON:  a professional decontaminant to remove ferrous residues and minerals with cleaning power! But what are ferrous residues? Ferrous or mineral residues are often invisible, microscopic particles which cannot be removed by a strong wash or even by traditional cleaners and detergents. Resulting from, for example, brake residues, which collect on any means of transport such as cars, motorcycles, trucks and vans. The typical situations of contamination are heavily trafficked streets or cities. You may be wondering why their treatment and removal is important? Over time, these microscopic iron particles may oxidise causing a corrosive chemical reaction, damaging the surfaces.  This is why we created KO IRON! Allowing you to quickly and effectively act and remove them! KO IRON is not a highly acidic decontaminant which is important because you can use it over the entire bodywork. Windows and steel, light alloy, chrome or polished rims!   Now let’s apply the ready-to-use 750 ml size on the rims, which is usually the most contaminated area.  The product is applied evenly over the entire surface.  As you can see, the product also adheres easily to vertical surfaces penetrating deeply.  Moreover it is very fast, reacting immediately after just a few seconds. As you can see, it is already turning purple! However, let’s leave it on for 2 to 5 minutes allowing it to dissolve all residues. In the meantime, use a Hard bristle Brush to thoroughly remove dirt and maximising the cleaning power.   A further essential feature of the product, compared to those available on the market, is its "low odour" formula. This will allow you to work close to the rims and the surface to be treated without strong and bothersome odours. Now let’s rinse. Let's now apply it on the bodywork and on the windows.   You may notice less colour change on the bodywork as it depends on the level of contamination present. We recommend proceeding panel by panel leaving the product on for the time necessary, preventing the product from drying out.   Then rinse. Remember avoid applying the product in the sun and on warm, porous or fabric surfaces. KO IRON is also available in the professional 4.54 L size jerry-can. All you need to do is to try it out yourself and let us know what you think in the comments section! See you next time!

product_name: Gyeon Q²m Leatherset Natural Modern Deri Günlük Hafif Temizlik ve Bakım Seti (5 Parça) - 200 ml
transcript_text: These are our Q²M LeatherSets They come in 2 versions, a Mild & a Strong one This sets are ideal to clean, maintain & protect any modern automotive leather upholstery Let me guide through the sets We have a foam pump, a horsehair brush with a really nice shape a microfiber towel to clean the residue off a microfiber applicator to finish with Q² LeatherCoat application. Before we start cleaning the leather you have to make sure that your leather is free of any sand or debris so make sure it's pretty well vacuumed Use the pump to get some foam on your brush and agitate the leather in a circular motion to loosen-up the dirt after that give it a wipe down with the included microfiber towel You can start with application of Q² LeatherCoat use little product on the Q²M MF applicator and apply it in small section When you clean really dirty leather use multiples towels and I would advise to have a damped microfiber as a second one a wipe dry with a third one to make sure there is no residue left on your leather upholstery Good luck!

product_name: Innovacar 0 Ammonıa Amonyaksız Cam Temizleyici Konsantre - 500 ml
transcript_text:
Hi guys! Today we are talking about cleaning windows
with 0 Ammonia Glass. Cleaning windows is often left for last, but
for anyone picking up their car after a good detailing treatment, one of the first things
they notice are the clean windows and with 0 Ammonia Glass they will be amazed by the
result and the appealing scent of the product! Cleaning the windows, inside and out, is the final finishing touch,
 which needs to be done at the end of all of the detailing steps. It needs to be done after having completely washed the car
 and decontaminated all of the surfaces, including the windows! Remember that! Because rust and iron residues 
deposit on the windows as well. In fact it needs to be done even after all
of the interior and exterior polishing and finishing stages. Are you wondering why? Because certainly all of the stages that we
have just listed leave dust deposits, product residues and other substances on the windows,
that would compromise visibility and the final result if not treated at the very end. This is precisely why it is crucial to degrease
the surface, and not just clean it, using a product such as 0 Ammonia Glass which deeply
cleans the part being treated by eliminating oily residues, grease, abrasive paste, smog,
nicotine, limescale... We recommend spraying the product on
the Micron Suede cloth and on the surface,  work it on using circular movements, you will notice
a special microfoam that degreases the surface and evaporates without streaking. Do you want to learn a helpful trick for very dirty surfaces
 that could require deep cleaning for a perfect result? Clean the exterior windows from the top down,
and the interior windows from left to right. This way, when the product dries, if there
are any streaks on the surface you will immediately know which side of the glass is still dirty,
from the direction of the streak! Plus, it is inevitable that the product comes
into contact with surrounding parts,  such as rubber, vinyl and plastic parts... 
you have no need to worry as 0 Ammonia Glass  does not contain ammonia, and this is a crucial
feature for preserving the other parts that it comes into contact with. So then why don’t you also try it as quick
drying APC? You will not regret it! However, never use it on
alcohol-sensitive surfaces! This special feature is also very helpful
for cleaning windshield wipers,  which we remind you to always keep clean. In fact, over time the rubber parts can dry and get
damaged and no longer adhere perfectly to the window. This can cause insufficient cleaning action or even
 scratch the windows, creating unsightly and bothersome lines. This is why it is crucial to clean the windshield
wipers with 0 Ammonia Glass as well. Always remember these two tips: One: after the washing stage always dry the
car well to avoid water from evaporating quickly and leaving limescale marks, which are mineral
deposits that stick to the surface leaving the paint and windows opaque. Two: never clean the windows under the sun
because this makes the detergent evaporate too quickly without degreasing and thereby
leaving streaks. Plus, another way of preventing limescale
from depositing on the windows is to apply a nanotechnological treatment or coating such
as our SC3 Glass Sealant which makes the window water repellent and helps keep it clean over time. This treatment seals the micro-porosity of the glass
 and prevents water and dirt from sticking to the surface. Instead they glide away without leaving any residues. The nanotechnological treatment improves the
performance of the windshield wipers and increases visibility even in poor weather conditions. We hope that this video was useful. Let us know what you think in the comments. See you next time!

know which side of the glass is still dirty,
from the direction of the streak!

Plus, it is inevitable that the product comes
into contact with surrounding parts,

such as rubber, vinyl and plastic parts... 
you have no need to worry as 0 Ammonia Glass

does not contain ammonia, and this is a crucial
feature for preserving the other parts that it comes into contact with.

So then why don’t you also try it as quick
drying APC? You will not regret it!

However, never use it on
alcohol-sensitive surfaces!

This special feature is also very helpful
for cleaning windshield wipers,
which we remind you to always keep clean.

In fact, over time the rubber parts can dry and get
damaged and no longer adhere perfectly to the window.

This can cause insufficient cleaning action or even
 scratch the windows, creating unsightly and bothersome lines.

This is why it is crucial to clean the windshield
wipers with 0 Ammonia Glass as well.
Always remember these two tips:

One: after the washing stage always dry the
car well to avoid water from evaporating quickly

and leaving limescale marks, which are mineral
deposits that stick to the surface leaving the paint and windows opaque.

Two: never clean the windows under the sun
because this makes the detergent evaporate

too quickly without degreasing and thereby
leaving streaks.

Plus, another way of preventing limescale
from depositing on the windows is to apply

a nanotechnological treatment or coating such
as our SC3 Glass Sealant which makes the window
water repellent and helps keep it clean over time.

This treatment seals the micro-porosity of the glass
 and prevents water and dirt from sticking to the surface.
Instead they glide away without leaving any residues.

The nanotechnological treatment improves the
performance of the windshield wipers and increases
visibility even in poor weather conditions.

product_name: Fra-Ber Fraber Ko Demir Tozu Temizleyici 4,54 Lt
transcript_text: Ko Iron is the iron remover and iron contaminant cleaner that removes iron residues and minerals that are difficult to eliminate with regular washing, such as iron residues caused by brake pads, pollution, railway dust, and acid rain from wheels, bodywork, and glass. It is equipped with a trigger that transforms the product from liquid to foam so that it adheres perfectly even on vertical surfaces, acting more intensely. The effect is also enhanced by the product's highly concentrated and gel formula. Wait for the product to react and change color, turning purple in 2-5 minutes, a very useful feature since it is thanks to the color change that you can see the product's reactive action. Where necessary, you can use a brush or a brush to help the product work in the most hidden areas where contamination can settle the most. Then rinse the product with high pressure, without letting it dry. We recommend using the product undiluted in cases of rust, while for iron decontamination on bodywork, dilute the product 1:1 to 1:2, i.e., use 500 to 330 ml of product and fill the remaining part with water, to obtain 1 liter of ready-to-use solution. The method of use is always the same. We remind you that unlike many decontaminants, Ko Iron has a low sulfur odor formula to make it more convenient to use at close distances.

product_name: Fra-Ber Bersolux Cilalı Köpüklü Manuel Araç Yıkama Şampuanı (1:120 Konsantre) - 25 kg
transcript_text: Bersolux is a concentrated neutral shampoo with added wax suitable for all types of paint, including matte, metallic, or wrapped finishes. Dilute 20 to 40 ml of Bersolux per liter of water in a bucket with a grit guard at the bottom. Rinse the vehicle thoroughly before applying the product, removing any dirt that could damage the bodywork. Use a clean glove or sponge for application, mixing the solution first. Thanks to the product's lubricating properties, it is easy to apply and glides while cleaning in depth. The product can also be applied with a pump and pre-compression. And distributed with a bristle brush. Finally, rinse thoroughly with plenty of water, from top to bottom, allowing the dirt to "flow" to the ground. A wax-enriched shampoo is highly functional because its water-repellent properties help water slide off, creating a "self-drying" effect. Being less foamy, it is also easier to rinse off. Additionally, the waxing properties fill in micro-scratches, leaving the bodywork shiny and glossy.

of the leather areas that I'm going to protect.

product_name: Gyeon Q²m Clay Lube Redefined Kil Kaydırıcı Yoğun Konsantre - 500 ml
transcript_text: Gyeon Q²M Clay & Q²M ClayLube are a great combo for effective removal of any type of contamination Gyeon introduces 2 types of clay-bar Q²M Clay Coarse for heavily contaminated cars that will need paint correction afterwards For a less aggressive approach we have Q²M Clay Mild along-that comes Q²M ClayLube which is a highly concentrated version and can be diluted up to 1:10 depending of your contamination level Make sure your car is properly washed and chemically decontaminated before you start any claying procedure The choice of Q²M Clay Coarse or Mild is up to you depending of the contamination level Don't use the whole block but only a small pice Kneed it to a flat pancake shape and then put it between your fingers Use your Q²M ClayLube spray a small amount of product on the area start rubbing gently in straight motions and inspect regularly your clay if you have too much contamination kneed if necessary & repeat the process After that rinse-off dry the panel & inspect Remember if the clay falls on the floor you are done - you need a new pice to continue if you've done the whole car you are ready for polishing One of the big advantages of our clay-bars they are both chemically resistant which mean you can use Q²M Iron & Q²M Tar to remove any types of contamination without dissolving the clay. If you want to store the clay-bars for a longer period of time use some Q²M ClayLube spray it in the plastic box and it will be much easier to get them out afterwards Good luck !

product_name: Gyeon Q2M Ppf Renew 120 ml
transcript_text: case you got paint protection film on your car starting to look a little bit bad maybe some stains some haziness how do you take care of that well we're going to talk about a new product from jian which is called PPF renew so stay tuned hi I'm Todd Cooper Rider here at esoteric we're helping auto enthusiasts live their passion with exceptional auto preservation products and services PPF renew by gian this was developed because one really lar the products out there on the market designed specifically for paint protection film it starts getting a stain it starts getting some haziness over time you know especially if it hasn't been maintained on a regular basis how do you do that you know do you go after it with a heavy polish well that could potentially damage the paint protection film so this is a chemical cleaner designed to clean all that stuff up we rewind here a little bit on one of the cars I had I had up a red Honda Civic Si that most of the time sat outside the shop here didn't get driven nothing happened to it it didn't get maintained so we cleaned it up one day and I was looking at the front end the paint protection film just looked horrible stains and stuff all over it which is indicative what people will experience if they don't maintain their car properly you may think wait a mintue you're the founder of esoteric how can your car not get maintained properly well we're too busy I can't get my own cars in and Dan won't squeeze me in the schedule any sooner so anyhow back to the car so we took it use the Rufus machine with a finishing pad light pressure low speed worked it in to the surface and it cleaned all that staining and everything off it made it look back to new condition again so I didn't have to scrap the paint protection film and we've done that with a lot of cars that have come in maybe somebody buys a used car it's fully wrapped in paint protection film it may look bad in some spots will go in treat it with the PPF renew then we can go in afterwards and put some kind of maintenance product could be a coating it could be a sealant it could be a wax whatever we decide to use on the car it's going to look good again a nice thing about it there's two different sizes here available the detailer or the shop that does paint protection film installation you got the big bottle for the consumer it's nice having the small bottle of it because you're gonna have some issues that come up how do you spot treat things you can use this by hand as well just take a nice soft foam applicator I like the ones that we sell and you can work it into the surface lightly buff it off boom you're done so really simple product very easy to use it doesn't matter if it is a paint protection film that is self-healing or non self-healing it's gonna work for them all it's not going to take a ten year old film that it's all swirled and scratched up with bug catching and and marks and stuff in it and magically let make it look brand new again no they're that case you need to pull it off and put new film on but if you got something that's even a couple of years old starting to look a little bit bad the PPF renew is a perfect product for doing that very very easy to use and with us much filament out there on the market both from a consumer standpoint and from a detailer and installation center point of view highly recommend having this at your disposal so now you've got your paint protection film all cleaned up all the spots and stains and haziness it off what do you do to it next well you want to add some protection back on it so make sure and click on the next video we're going to take you over to cosmic spritz which we find to be a really good product for maintaining a perfect looking pay protection film [Music] [Music]

product_name: Gyeon Q2 Can Coat Evo 200 ml
transcript_text: [Music] A coating that's going to be safe on all the exterior surfaces of your car. Introducing Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO. This true SiO2 spray ceramic coating is going to be super easy to use as a matter of fact it's the easiest to use of the GYEON coating lineup and once it's done, it's going to provide you with up to 12 months of durability because so much product comes in one bottle, you can use it on multiple cars Versatility is what makes Q² CanCoat EVO truly stand out. You could use it on the paint, wheels, trim and even your side windows but if you're looking to put something on the windshield, then I'm going to reach for GYEON Q² QuickView. Guide Application Step 1: Ensure the surface you work on has been washed and properly degreased - we recommend using Q²M Prep Step 2: Do 2-3 sprays of Q² CanCoat EVO in the included microfiber Step 3: Start wiping on the surface in your preferred motion Step 4: Flip your towel and buff the till full gloss Since Q² CanCoat EVO is a spray ceramic coating you need to be conscious of the overspray. What I recommend doing is stepping away from the vehicle, cupping your towel and holding it close as you spray it. [Music]

product_name: Fra-Ber Pulitutto Deri, Kumaş ve Plastik Temizleyici Köpük - 1000 ml
transcript_text:
Hi guys, many of you have asked us how to degrease, hygienise and give a fresh fragrance to   fabrics, plastic materials and semi-leather in your car...today, in our Experience Area, we will show you the best way to use our Pulitutto concentrated degreaser! To show you the best result, we are going to divide our door into two areas: one is the area we will clean, and the other we will leave as is. We start with the 750 ml ready-to-use version: spray the product onto our damp Micron HD cloth  and then on the surface. Do not do the opposite otherwise the product may run.  Also be careful, for the reasons we have mentioned,  on vertical surfaces, we recommend spraying the product from the bottom upwards. You can also use a Soft Touch brush to help you. Lastly, use a clean, damp cloth to wipe the surface: we use our Micron Up. For the 1000 ml version, we recommend buying our graduated bottle and the sprayer with the black top in order to dilute the product in the best way possible. Thanks to the silk-screen printing, our graduated bottle  will be of much help to dilute the products, using them correctly! In this case, we have a very dirty fabric and we will therefore dilute our product in a ratio of 1:10:  pour the water up to the point established and then add the remaining part with the product. In case of medium/low dirt, we recommend dilution of 1:25. Now close the bottle!
Proceed with spraying it on the fabric:  one of the characteristics of Pulitutto is that it is a low-foaming product to leave less residues. You can use a brush in order to distribute it and remove deeper dirt. Then use the clean, damp Micron HD cloth to remove everything. The product can also be used with the Max Cleaning Gun as a prewash,  followed by using an extraction machine.  After cleaning, remember not to leave the seats wet so as to avoid unpleasant odours. Speaking of which, our Pulitutto prevents  the onset of unpleasant odours! It is also ideal in summer  when you forget to dry fabrics and humidity generates unpleasant odours. After cleaning, you will smell a fantastic fresh fragrance!

transcript_text: [Music] hi this is Todd with esoteric art CARICOM today we're going to be taking a look at a G on waffle dryer towel G on waffle dryer towel the waffle weave technology and microfiber towels have been out there for a while and they've proven to be the most popular for drying applications if you take a look at the surface on it this is a little bit different than your standard microfiber towel and this holds a lot of water weight these are very very absorbent the best way to use these you want to avoid rubbing on the surface as much as possible so when we're drying a car after we've washed it will literally take the towel put it on the surface drag it across and then that is going to soak everything up on there and if you have anything else that's left over you can take even a separate one and you can blot those surfaces and that's going to remove all the rest of the water from there these are fantastic whether it's on paint paint protection film glass anywhere on the external surface of the car absolutely wonderful for drying it and doing it safely these are very very soft it might not look like it from the dimpled texture of it very soft to the surface very safe to your paint provided you take care of them properly speaking of taking care of them properly you want to make sure and wash them and dry them the right way as well I've seen some people take their towels Rome in a bucket or something afterwards no you want to make sure that those get washed and put away immediately your microfiber towels and your pads if you're a professional detailer those are your two most expensive categories for everything to run your business or if you're a DIY person at home taking care of your own cars you're gonna build up quite an inventory of nice microfiber towels you want to take care of them the right way what I would recommend is using Gyan towel wash wash these separately from your other towels don't include them with any other kind of clothes or cotton towels or anything else just keep your microfiber your nicer microfiber together you're gonna wash it on hot wash cold rinse for a full load about 50 mil of Gyan towel wash it's all it's going to need then when you put it in the dryer put it on the lowest setting possible it's preferred to actually hang dry these but it's not always convenient in most cases if you're unable to do that put it in the dryer on the lowest setting you don't want to use any kind of fabric softeners no drying towels or anything with it you want them to stay absorbent and by adding adding one of those dryer towels or by using any kind of fabric softeners you will prevent it from having its maximum absorbency so make sure that you take care of them the right way and after you're done cleaning them put them in a safe dry environment so they can't get any kind of dirt on it because all it takes is one little piece of dirt in there and it's going to scratch the surface but don't just take my word on how good these are go onto our website at esoteric car care com look at the product page for the waffle dryer towel by gian read what information or reviews other people have left behind or if you've got some information that you would like to leave we definitely appreciate you taking a few moments fill out the review form on it and when you're done watching this video also appreciate if you subscribe to our youtube channel because we're constantly updating new videos on detailing products tools and techniques that's about all for today for jian waffle dryer towel and esoteric car care com I'm Todd Cooper Rider thanks we'll see you again next time [Music]

transcript_text: hey guys jeff here with geon usa and today we're going to take a closer look at geon q2 moe's evo the legend reinvented [Music] so what's new about the geon evo line of paint coatings everything every single formulation has been improved to offer a leap forward in durability chemical resistance and user experience q2mos is a long-running workhorse in the geoencoding lineup it's one of the first coatings i ever installed and something i'm very attached to but i'm happy to report that most evo is better in every single way it's a highly technical unique formula and a real first in the car care industry most evo is not an infused product there's nothing floating in your bottle moe's evo is a fluorine modified polysalizine i'll say that again it's a fluorine modified polyxylazine and that's not to say that there's any fluorine in the actual formula fluorine is used in the precursor stage to modify the polysilazine molecules as they're building the coating this leads to amazing performance characteristics and an install that is silky smooth so what does a fluoro modified polycylosine based ceramic coating mean to you the end consumer it offers a level of chemical resistance that allows the hydrophobic properties of this coating to last longer than anything we've seen before think the surface feel and water behavior of duraflex and syncro in a single layer easy to install ceramic coating whose properties last for years even with subpar maintenance now let's explore the application mo's evo is beyond easy to apply it's designed in a single layer that offers at least 36 months durability the first step is to always make sure that any oils and lubricants from a previous detailing or polishing stage are properly removed perform a degreasing wash if necessary and a final wipe down with q2m prep apply a generous amount of mos-evo to the included microfiber applicator the trick to moe's evo is to make sure you put enough material on the finish and then not overwork that material once it's applied make sure you put a thick wet layer of coating on the paint as moses is going to give you a very clear working signal when it's ready to be removed i like to work in a shoulder width roughly two by two foot working area i run a center line left to right and then spread off that center line up and down tightening up my edges at the end the perfect time to remove moe's evo is when the product starts to sweat or bead this will happen within 30 seconds of the material being on the finish so if you overwork the product you'll miss this signal mohs evo is designed around efficiency a 30 mil bottle in a single layer application is designed to go as far as a 50 mil used to so for any two door or four door car 30 mil is plenty if you're doing multiple layers or a larger vehicle jump up to the 50 ml bottle for removal use at least two high quality microfiber towels we recommend the geom bald wipe and soft white i like the bald wipe for my initial removal and the soft wipe to pick up any excess material that you've successfully applied mohs evo to your paint you've got the most technically advanced ceramic coating on the market offering gloss protection and an unrivaled durability of its hydrophobic effect enjoy you

product_name: Gyeon Q² Trim Evo Plastik Koruyucu ve Solmuş Plastik Yenileyici Seramik Kaplama - 30ML
transcript_text: In today's video, I'm going to be using Geon Trim Evo, which they did kindly send for me to test out. So, I'm going to be showing you the full prep and application process, and of course, what the results look like at the end, as well as some tips hopefully to help you if you are planning on applying this yourself. So, the first thing that I did here was use Gian's trim cleaner on a detailing brush in order to really deep clean the trim after the contact wash. Now, you don't have to use a dedicated trim cleaner here. You could use an APC or a citrus, just something to really deep clean those areas that's a little bit stronger than a regular maintenance shampoo. Once I'd rinsed the car, I did use my Blow Air RS car dryer in order to blast the water out the intricate areas that are typically prone to trapping it. This is quite useful before applying any type of coating as it does avoid any annoying drips throughout the application process. But if you don't have anything like this, then just make sure you are thorough with a microfiber towel and get into all those panel gaps. The next product that I went in with is Gian's prep, which is a panel wipe solution designed to remove any oils or residues before applying a coating. I definitely wouldn't skip out on this stage, and I do like to use a panel wipe solution from whichever coating manufacturer that I am using, but it is really important here just to make sure you've got as clean a surface as possible before applying that product. So, in this little kit here that you do get with the product, you get four suede applicators and an application block, 30 mil of the coating itself. You also get a set of instructions as well. Now, the application process is actually really straightforward. I gave the coating bottle a shake to start with and then drizzled some onto one of my suede applicators. It then just needs spreading evenly over the surface. And then after around 30 seconds, I did give it a very light wipe with a microfiber towel in order to remove any excess. Now, you can leave it a little bit longer than this. You don't have to do it instantly, but I personally like to make sure that excess is removed before moving on to coating the next section. Once the coating has been applied, you do need to make sure it doesn't get wet for 12 hours after application. So, if you are planning on applying it outdoors, just make sure you keep an eye on the weather forecast and make sure it's an appropriate day to do it. Once you're done with the application process, your towels and your applicators will likely harden after the coating cures in them. So, I definitely wouldn't use them anywhere near paint again. And I personally do just throw them away or just use them to wipe down the tires on the next wash. So, in terms of the reasons why you might like to use a product like this on your trim, firstly, they do help to restore a faded finish. Now, that wasn't massively what I was using it for here. Yeah, the plastics could have been a touch darker, but the finish was generally pretty good. I was mainly using it for that UV protection to help keep the plastics looking fresher for longer and in order to prevent that fading in the first place. Now, the durability of this is up to 36 months. And this is something that I can obviously look to monitor as it is on my own vehicle. Even if it doesn't last for that long, it is miles better in terms of durability compared to regular trim dressings that typically only last until the next wash and sometimes have a tendency to run when it rains as well. I personally do think trim coatings are one of the best things you can use on your car, even if you don't use a coating on the rest of the vehicle, as they just leave a really nice finish and you don't have to worry about it on every single wash. Now, with most coatings, I like to leave it at least a week before washing, but usually I'll try and wait two weeks if possible, just to make sure the coating has as long as it can to cure. Here you can see what it looked like on that first wash. And there was a decent amount of beading left behind and also a nice dark finish. As always, I will link all the products I've used here in the description. And if you have found this video helpful, then it would be great if you could drop it a like and thanks very much for watching.

durability of this is up to 36 months.
And this is something that I can
obviously look to monitor as it is on my
own vehicle. Even if it doesn't last for
that long, it is miles better in terms
of durability compared to regular trim
dressings that typically only last until
the next wash and sometimes have a
tendency to run when it rains as well. I
personally do think trim coatings are
one of the best things you can use on
your car, even if you don't use a
coating on the rest of the vehicle, as
they just leave a really nice finish and
you don't have to worry about it on
every single wash. Now, with most
coatings, I like to leave it at least a
week before washing, but usually I'll
try and wait two weeks if possible, just
to make sure the coating has as long as
it can to cure. Here you can see what it
looked like on that first wash. And
there was a decent amount of beading
left behind and also a nice dark finish.
As always, I will link all the products
I've used here in the description. And
if you have found this video helpful,
then it would be great if you could drop
it a like and thanks very much for
watching.

of the first coatings i ever installed and something i'm very attached to but i'm happy to report that most evo is better in every single way it's a highly technical unique formula and a real first in the car care industry most evo is not an infused product there's nothing floating in your bottle moe's evo is a fluorine modified polysalizine i'll say that again it's a fluorine modified polyxylazine and that's not to say that there's any fluorine in the actual formula fluorine is used in the precursor stage to modify the polysilazine molecules as they're building the coating this leads to amazing performance characteristics and an install that is silky smooth so what does a fluoro modified polycylosine based ceramic coating mean to you the end consumer it offers a level of chemical resistance that allows the hydrophobic properties of this coating to last longer than anything we've seen before think the surface feel and water behavior of duraflex and syncro in a single layer easy to install ceramic coating whose properties last for years even with subpar maintenance now let's explore the application mo's evo is beyond easy to apply it's designed in a single layer that offers at least 36 months durability the first step is to always make sure that any oils and lubricants from a previous detailing or polishing stage are properly removed perform a degreasing wash if necessary and a final wipe down with q2m prep apply a generous amount of mos-evo to the included microfiber applicator the trick to moe's evo is to make sure you put enough material on the finish and then not overwork that material once it's applied make sure you put a thick wet layer of coating on the paint as moses is going to give you a very clear working signal when it's ready to be removed i like to work in a shoulder width roughly two by two foot working area i run a center line left to right and then spread off that center line up and down tightening up my edges at the end the perfect time to remove moe's evo is when the product starts to sweat or bead this will happen within 30 seconds of the material being on the finish so if you overwork the product you'll miss this signal mohs evo is designed around efficiency a 30 mil bottle in a single layer application is designed to go as far as a 50 mil used to so for any two door or four door car 30 mil is plenty if you're doing multiple layers or a larger vehicle jump up to the 50 ml bottle for removal use at least two high quality microfiber towels we recommend the geom bald wipe and soft white i like the bald wipe for my initial removal and the soft wipe to pick up any excess material that you've successfully applied mohs evo to your paint you've got the most technically advanced ceramic coating on the market offering gloss protection and an unrivaled durability of its hydrophobic effect enjoy you

product_name: Fra-Ber Bersolwax Seramik Içerikli Yeni Nesil Araç Yıkama Şampuanı - 1000 ml
transcript_text: Bersolwax by Fra-Ber is the latest-generation ceramic shampoo, designed to wash, polish and protect paintwork. Before starting, always make sure to remove any bracelets or wristwatches to avoid accidentally scratching the bodywork during washing. We recommend using it  with bucket washing, although it can also be applied, if required, with pressure spray pump and foam gun. Dilute 20 to 30 ml of Bersolwax per litre of water and stir to homogenise the solution before use. Apply the solution with a clean wash mitt or sponge, then rinse thoroughly with plenty of water. If applied with a foam gun and foam lance it can be used either pure or diluted up to a ratio of 1:3. Its special formula cleans surfaces while providing gloss and protection. This reduces the number of washing steps, combining shampoo and sealant in a single step. After application, always rinse thoroughly with plenty of water, working from top to bottom. During rinsing, the hydrophobic effect becomes evident: water rapidly sheets off the surface, providing immediate visible protection. If applied with a pressure spray pump, dilute between 1:32 and 1:49. That is, use 30 ml to 20 ml of product and fill up with water to obtain a 1 L ready-to-use solution. After application, always rinse thoroughly with plenty of water. Bersolwax is the ideal product for washing already protected cars, extending the durability of coatings.

If applied with a foam gun and foam lance it can be used either pure or diluted up to a ratio of 1:3.
Its special formula cleans surfaces while providing gloss and protection.

After application, always rinse thoroughly with plenty of water, working from top to bottom.
During rinsing, the hydrophobic effect becomes evident: water rapidly sheets off the surface, providing immediate visible protection.
If applied with a pressure spray pump, dilute between 1:32 and 1:49.
That is, use 30 ml to 20 ml of product and fill up with water to obtain a 1 L ready-to-use solution.
After application, always rinse thoroughly with plenty of water.
Bersolwax is the ideal product for washing already protected cars, extending the durability of coatings.

product_name: Gyeon Q²m Cure Redefined Araç Boya Koruma ve Bakım Spreyi - 100 ml -Seramik Bazlı Koruyucu Nano
transcript_text: In this episode, I'll give you the last touch for maintaining your coated car! After the final rinse of our coated car we are ready to give it the last touch.  For that we have 2 products We have Q²M Cure it's a strong SiO₂ sealant that we can use wet or dry Now we still have some moisture on the paintwork so in this case we can use Q²M Cure and spray directly on the paint. 2 sprays I take Q²M PolishWipe on the short side and I cover the whole panel Make sure to not use only one side of the towel all the time for the whole car  so flip it or use the other side  to give it a final buff When using Q²M Cure dry, it is really important to not overuse the product So with the Q²M PolishWipe, I have enough with couple of sprays  to do this whole panel dry. Q²M Cure is really important in the aftercare of your coating so we advise to use it once every 2 to 3 months. Every weekly wash you can use a quickdetailer like this one and make your paint super glossy and super slick If you have coated your car for a longer period of time First thing you have to do it's to decontaminate it with Q²M Iron & Q²M Tar after that you can boost hydrophobicity with Q²M WetCoat or Q²M Bathe+ and if you want to find out more about theses product click the link below I hope you like theses videos about how to maintain your coated car  this is crucial for a great and satisfying experience  I'm done - I'm out - time for an expresso - Ciao!

product_name: Fra-Ber Lustratouch Mum Bazlı Boya Koruyucu ve Parlatıcı - 5 Lt
transcript_text: Hey guys, welcome to our experience area! In this episode we will talk to you about our Lustratouch product. Lustratouch, an amazing product! You get three functions in a single product: polish, wax and protective treatment! This product is a liquid wax that is super fast to use without water on a dry and clean car, offering extra shine and protection, for a perfect result. And now let’s see how to use it! Spray the product evenly at a distance of 20 cm, working in small areas to obtain a perfect result. Be careful! Don’t apply the product to a hot surface. Spread the product with circular movements, using a long fibred microfibre cloth, until it is completely applied. When your cloth glides over like silk this means that the product has polymerised! Our Micron Buffing is perfect because it is seamless, therefore it allows you to spread the product safely  without any chance of scratching the surface. The product is also suitable for plastic, aluminium and glass. Not only does it provide a glossy and protective effect, but it makes the surface of your car smooth and water-repellent, preventing dirt from sticking easily. Lustratouch is easy to use  because it does not contain abrasives, everyone can use it. The formula does not leave any streaks unlike traditional waxes that are hard to apply. In a very short amount of time your car will be polished with amazing results! Remember that to prolong the protective effect, the car always needs to be treated with a decontaminant, such as our Red Wheels, and then maintained with a gentle neutral shampoo  such as our Bersolux.

product_name: Fra-Ber Lega Jant, Balata, Toz Temizleyici, Parlatıcı 750 Ml
transcript_text: Lega is the degreaser and cleaner for all types of alloy car rims and a cleaner for tires of any brand and model. Spray the product evenly from the inside out and into the most hidden crevices. Then also spray on the tire, as it is also suitable for cleaning tires. In this way, it is possible to treat the entire wheel with a single product. The product is very effective, so it is usually possible to use it without brushes. However, if the dirt is very stubborn, it is advisable to use a brush. Or use the mechanical action of a rim brush to clean the back of the spokes and the rim channel thoroughly. Alternatively, use a glove to clean the inside of the rim very well. Finally, clean the tire with a special brush that allows you to remove dirt that has formed inside the grooves of markings and logos. Finally, rinse the product with high pressure. The result is a deep clean that acts on brake dust, brake pad residues, and stubborn dirt, leaving the surface shiny with a protective antioxidant film.
